data.name: Crown of Lust [18+] 👑
data.detailed_description:
從骯髒的後巷到禁忌的歡愉——你的故事才剛剛開始。

你是一個街頭精明的騙子，出身卑微卻心懷大志：溫馨的房子、裝滿黃金的寶箱，還有一位身材火辣的農家女孩在你的床上。

在一個權力、慾望與背叛主宰的世界裡，重要的不是誰更強——而是誰更聰明。

從傲慢的貴族那裡偷竊，靠手段致富，誘惑任何你需要的人，打造屬於你自己的放縱天堂。

你的選擇塑造你的命運——以及你那些放縱的冒險。

Crown of Lust [18+] 👑 是一款大膽的18+視覺小說，獻給那些明白真正的力量不在於劍，而在於頭腦……以及一點無法抗拒的魅力。

主要特色：

🃏 掌握投機之道
說謊、欺騙並誘惑上層精英——頭腦永遠勝過武力。

💋 火辣戀情與18+激情場景
調情、征服，沉浸在完全無刪減的成人互動中。你的選擇將解鎖全新狂野體驗。

👑 黑暗而誘人的中世紀世界
探索一座充滿祕密、黃金與誘惑的城市。從陰暗酒館到貴族寢室——沒有禁地。

🔥 誘惑是你的秘密武器
迷倒富人和權貴。贏得芳心、竊取財富，並留下破碎的承諾（和呻吟的情人）。

🎲 孤注一擲
在高風險的遊戲中不擇手段，每個選擇都可能帶來巨大回報——或徹底毀滅。

data.short_description: 智勝貴族，偷走他們的黃金，用誘惑換取自由！Crown of Lust 👑 是一款火辣的18+視覺小說，在這裡頭腦勝過刀劍，每個選擇都帶來新的快感——或新的麻煩。你的墮落崛起現在開始！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD

data.name: Crown of Lust [18+] 👑
data.detailed_description:
From filthy back alleys to forbidden pleasures — your story is just getting started.

You’re a street-smart con artist, born in the gutter but dreaming big: a cozy house, chests full of gold, and a busty farm girl in your bed.

In a world where power, lust, and betrayal rule the game, it’s not about who’s strongest — it’s about who’s smartest.

Steal from the pompous nobles, hustle your way into riches, seduce whoever you need to, and carve out your own naughty little paradise.

Your choices shape your destiny — and your dirty adventures.

is Crown of Lust [18+] 👑 a bold 18+ visual novel for those who know that real power lies not in swords, but in wit... and a little bit of irresistible charm.

Key Features:

🃏 Master the art of the hustle
Lie, cheat, and seduce your way through the highborn elites — brains over blades, always.
💋 Spicy romance and steamy 18+ scenes
Flirt, conquer, and dive into fully uncensored adult encounters. Your choices unlock wild new adventures between the sheets.
👑 A dark, seductive medieval world
Explore a city dripping with secrets, gold, and temptation. From shady taverns to noble chambers — no place is off-limits.
🔥 Seduction is your secret weapon
Charm the pants off the rich and powerful. Win hearts, steal fortunes, and leave a trail of broken promises (and moaning lovers) behind you.
🎲 All-in or nothing
Play dirty in high-stakes games where every risk could lead to mind-blowing rewards — or your total downfall.

data.short_description: Outsmart nobles, steal their gold, and seduce your way to freedom! Crown of Lust 👑 is a spicy 18+ visual novel where brains beat swords and every choice leads to new pleasures — or fresh trouble. Your dirty rise to glory starts now!
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS
  • Processor: Apple M1
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
